message:
fix(lab): gate oracle tracing test on tracing-integration feature

The oracle_report_emits_structured_oracle_check_events test relies on
tracing events emitted by crate::tracing_compat::info!, which is a
no-op when the tracing-integration feature is disabled. Gate the test
and its supporting types (EventRecorder, EventFieldVisitor, RecordedEvent)
behind #[cfg(feature = "tracing-integration")] so the test suite passes
without the feature enabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
